name: Shopify sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Shopify sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate commission calculations cause payment delays. We automate commission payout reports instead of manual calculations using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inaccurate commission calculations lead to payment delays and disputes.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inaccurate commission calculations lead to payment delays and disputes.
